title: The Golden Enclosure
lines: The air here is thick with the scent of ozone and dry grass. You stand before a massive, geometric enclosure made of reinforced glass and glowing orange moss.
In the center of the artificial savannah, a majestic lion sits motionless. It is not a beast of bone and fur, but a shimmering golden silhouette that seems to be carved from the desert sunset itself.
Its eyes are two tiny, glowing terminal-green lights, watching your every move with predatory calculation.

options.desc: 1. Tap on the glass to get the creature's attention
2. Carefully back away from the enclosure
